<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Pest\Mutate\Mutators\Array; use Pest\Mutate\Mutators\Abstract\AbstractFunctionCallUnwrapMutator; class UnwrapArrayReplaceRecursive extends AbstractFunctionCallUnwrapMutator { public const SET = 'Array'; public const DESCRIPTION = 'Unwraps `array_replace_recursive` calls.'; public const DIFF = <<<'DIFF' $a = array_replace_recursive([1, 2, 3], ['a', 'b', 'c']); // [tl! remove] $a = [1, 2, 3]; // [tl! add] DIFF; public static function functionName(): string { return 'array_replace_recursive'; } }
